briefdescription.para: Number of options in option table.
Sets the options for the QSPIPSU device driver.The options control how the device behaves relative to the QSPIPSU bus.

detaileddescription.para: The device must be idle rather than busy transferring data before setting these device options.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the specified options to be set. This is a bit mask where a 1 indicates the option should be turned ON and a 0 indicates no action. One or more bit values may be contained in the mask. See the bit definitions named XQSPIPSU_*_OPTIONS in the file xqspipsu.h.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if options are successfully set.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. The transfer must complete or be aborted before setting options.

briefdescription.para: Resets the options for the QSPIPSU device driver.

detaileddescription.para: The options control how the device behaves relative to the QSPIPSU bus. The device must be idle rather than busy transferring data before setting these device options.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the specified options to be set. This is a bit mask where a 1 indicates the option should be turned OFF and a 0 indicates no action. One or more bit values may be contained in the mask. See the bit definitions named XQSPIPSU_*_OPTIONS in the file xqspipsu.h.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if options are successfully set.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. The transfer must complete or be aborted before setting options.

briefdescription.para: Gets the options for the QSPIPSU device.

detaileddescription.para: The options control how the device behaves relative to the QSPIPSU bus.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XQspiPsu instance.
Options contains the specified options currently set. This is a bit value where a 1 means the option is on, and a 0 means the option is off. See the bit definitions named XQSPIPSU_*_OPTIONS in file xqspipsu.h.

briefdescription.para: Configures the clock according to the prescaler passed.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. It must be stopped to re-initialize.
XST_FAILURE if Prescaler value is less than FreqDiv when feedback clock is not enabled.

briefdescription.para: Used to tell the QSPIPSU driver the hardware flash configuration being used.

detaileddescription.para: This API should be called at least once in the application. If desired, it can be called multiple times when switching between communicating to different flash devices/using different configs.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_IS_STARTED if the device is already started. It must be stopped to re-initialize.

simplesect.para: If this function is not called at least once in the application, the driver assumes there is a single flash connected to the lower bus and CS line.

briefdescription.para: Sets the Read mode for the QSPIPSU device driver.

detaileddescription.para: The device must be idle rather than busy transferring data before setting Read mode options.

parameterdescription.para: Contains the specified Mode to be set. See the bit definitions named XQSPIPSU_READMODE_* in the file xqspipsu.h.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if options are successfully set.
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the device is currently transferring data. The transfer must complete or be aborted before setting Mode.

briefdescription.para: Sets the Write Protect and Hold options for the QSPIPSU device driver.

detaileddescription.para: The device must be idle rather than busy transferring data before setting Write Protect and Hold options.

parameterdescription.para: Value of the WP_HOLD bit in configuration register

simplesect.para: This function is not thread-safe. This function can only be used with single flash configuration and x1/x2 data mode. This function cannot be used with x4 data mode and dual parallel and stacked flash configuration.
